stats.fact: Gemini Batch API offers 50% discount on all paid models for async, non-real-time workloads
Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite standard pricing: $0.25/1M input tokens, $1.50/1M output tokens
With Batch API, effective pricing drops to ~$0.125/1M input and ~$0.75/1M output tokens
Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite achieves 328 tokens/second throughput — 2.5x faster than Gemini 2.5 Flash
Context window: 1,048,576 tokens; max output: 65,536 tokens
Elo score of 1432 on Arena.ai Leaderboard; 86.9% on GPQA Diamond benchmark
Batch API target turnaround is 24 hours but typically completes much faster in practice
Stacking batch + prompt caching discounts can cut costs by 90%+ vs synchronous uncached calls
Processing 10,000 daily requests with 60% routed to Flash-Lite Batch costs roughly $3.68/day
Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite launched in preview on March 3, 2026 via Google AI Studio and Vertex AI
